---
title: "About"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

This project is a workflowr repository containing code needed to
generate all figures and analyses in Annapragada et. al., 2025 - “Cell-free DNA fragmentomes for non-invasive detection of liver cirrhosis and other diseases”. Please refer to the README in the top level directory for additional details.
